attacking_style: Opportunistic finisher who exploits tactical situations in final 3km on rolling terrain. Wins through precise timing and positioning rather than sustained climbing power.
team_tactics: Relies on other teams (e.g., Jumbo-Visma) to control dangerous moves, then capitalizes on the regrouping to launch late attacks when favorites have expended energy.
terrain_preference: Rolling finishes where pure climbers cannot dominate but power-to-weight still matters. Thrives in reduced bunch sprints after selective racing.
vulnerability: Insufficient data on long climbs or mountain-top finishes. Likely exposed on sustained gradients where raw climbing power determines outcomes rather than tactical timing.
key_patterns: Attacks inside final 3km on rolling finishes when reduced selection exists
Capitalizes on neutralized moves by waiting for regrouping before striking
Wins through timing precision rather than sustained climbing dominance
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from early 2022 provides insufficient data for trajectory assessment
